title: Su-Kam Power Systems is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Su-Kam Power Systems is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Su-Kam Power Systems in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Su-Kam Power Systems:
Su-Kam Power Systems is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems!
